pattern: Recording the position of each value lets you read off a chosen subset in the original sequence's order with a single membership pass.
hints: You need each friend ranked by where they appear in the finishing order, not by their ID.
Mark which IDs belong to friends, then walk the finishing order once.
Build a set of friend IDs, scan order left to right, and collect any value that is in the set.

edge_inputs.description: friends finish out of ID order
single participant who is the only friend
friend IDs increasing but finishing order reversed

stress.description: random permutation of 1..n with a sorted random friend subset
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    order = list(range(1, n + 1))
    rng.shuffle(order)
    fcount = rng.randrange(1, min(8, n) + 1)
    friends = sorted(rng.sample(range(1, n + 1), fcount))
    return [order, friends]
stress.note: friends kept strictly increasing as required
